name: Banana Split Crumb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter and 1/2 cup sugar with cracker crumbs together.
2. Press into a 9 x 13-inch pan. Bake for 5 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Cream the cream cheese and 1 1/2 cups sugar separately.
4. Spread over the crust.
5. Slice bananas, pour pineapple juice over them, and drain before placing on top of the cream cheese to prevent browning.
6. Whip the cream by adding sugar and vanilla; fold in the pineapple.
7. Spread over the bananas.
8. Sprinkle with chopped nuts and cherries.
9. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
